description: Baseline results from Fabian's experiments. 2L = 2-layer distilled student. Tasks: ASR(WER↓), KS, IC, SID, ER, SingID, VocID, InstCls, PitchID, GenreID, ESC50 (all Acc%↑ except ASR)

hubert_base_12L.note: Full HuBERT Base (12 layers, no merging)

naive_avg_12L_no_alignment.note: Naive 0.5/0.5 average of full HuBERT + MERT (12 layers each, no alignment). From Fabian's existing experiments.

perm_2L_distilled_0.9_0.1.note: Permutation-correlation merging, 2-layer distilled students, λ_speech=0.9, λ_music=0.1, FFN+Attn alignment
